title: scrophularia mollis
intro: Scrophularia mollis, also known as the downy figwort, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system and improve digestion. The health benefits of Scrophularia mollis include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is also sometimes used in herbal supplements and infusions.
